description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named C/C++ CI that runs on every push. Use four jobs for different platforms: build-linux on ubuntu-20.04, build-macos-current and build-macos-10.15 on macos-latest and macos-10.15 respectively, and build-windows on windows-latest. For each job, check out the repository, install required packages, and build the project using make or gmake. Upload build artifacts for each platform.
